prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 6 of a layered paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample and defines the visual medium; scene 1's study-room description defines the location
Primary request: return to the same modest mountain study room, now in clear early-morning light; low desk with blank paper ready for writing, blank book bundles, lattice window, shelving and mountain view
Scene/backdrop: generalized Tang-era study; warm morning ivory and restrained gold entering from the window, cooler mountains outside; no people
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, visible mulberry fibers, hand-torn edges, matte mineral pigments, restrained ink, dimensional paper shadows
Composition/framing: wide 16:9; desk slightly right of center with clear seated-character space; clean upper breathing room and subtitle-safe lower band; no baked-in foreground branches
Lighting/mood: renewed attention, calm resolve, no triumphal spectacle
Constraints: blank paper only; no written characters, captions, signs, watermark, logo, people, animals, modern items or frame
Avoid: glossy 3D, plastic cartoon, photorealism, anime, glowing halo, text-like marks
